question: Did the research article titled 'Nature Search' by Thuan Phuoc Dinh, Tu Cam Ly, and Tuan Ngoc Nguyen focus on developing a cost-effective plant-based medium for enhanced spore production of B. amyloliquefaciens CN12 in March 2026?
Did the study by Mesinovic et al. published in Communications Medicine in January 2026 utilize AI foundation models to implement heart disease screening in people living with HIV in Vietnam?

Did the article titled 'Innovation curse: the wastefulness of technologies believed to mitigate climate change' by Thi Mai Anh Tran, Valoree Gagnon, and Minh-Hoang Nguyen appear in the journal Nature Medicine in November 2025?

Did the research by Jeremy Farrar, Cameron P. Simmons, and Menno D. de Jong published in Nature Medicine in September 2006 associate fatal outcomes of human influenza A (H5N1) with high viral load and hypercytokinemia?

Did the benchmark study titled 'A benchmark of expert-level academic questions to assess AI capabilities' by Davide Scaramuzza, Alice Gatti, and Long Phan, published in Nature in January 2026, use the name 'Humanity’s Last Exam' for the multi-modal benchmark?

Did the article by Tho D. Nguyen, Ashwin T. Magar, and Tu Anh Ngo published in Nature Communications in December 2025 report that their fullerene-decorated PdCo nano-resistor network sensor achieved a detection limit of 40 ppb at room temperature?
Did the study by George Q. Daley, Francesco Ferrari, and Alejandro De Los Angeles titled 'Failure to replicate the STAP cell phenomenon' appear in the journal Scientific Reports in September 2015?

Did the research by Sudha Rao, Michelle Melino, and Wen Juan Tu published in Nature Communications in June 2023 demonstrate that a peptide targeting the ACE2 nuclear localization signal promotes its methylation and abrogates viral replication of SARS-CoV-2 in Syrian hamsters?

Did the article by Kenlo Nishida Nasahara, Sota Hirayama, and Van Thinh Truong published in Scientific Reports in February 2024 describe JAXA’s new high-resolution land use land cover map for Vietnam using a time-feature convolutional neural network?

Did the study by P. Zhelnin, M. Ackermann, and R. Abbasi published in Nature Physics in October 2022 report strong evidence for anomalous conversions between neutrino flavours in their search for quantum gravity using astrophysical neutrino flavour with IceCube?
